blueprintRow.moduleExitOutcome: Learner can greet people politely, introduce themselves at a basic level, ask who/what/where questions, and survive the first minute of a conversation.
blueprintRow.lessonPrimaryOutcome: Learner can say your name, ask someone's name, and state where you are from.
blueprintRow.lessonSecondaryOutcome: Learner can recycle recent vocabulary while using origin pattern with มาจาก in short controlled output.
blueprintRow.grammarFunctionPrimary: name question pattern with ชื่อ
blueprintRow.grammarFunctionSecondary: origin pattern with มาจาก
blueprintRow.newVocabCore: ชื่อ = name; คน = person; ประเทศ = country; ไทย = Thailand / Thai; อังกฤษ = England / British; อเมริกา = America; มาจาก = come from
blueprintRow.newChunksCore: คุณชื่ออะไร = what is your name?; ฉัน/ผมชื่อ... = my name is ...; ฉัน/ผมมาจาก... = I am from ...
blueprintRow.reviewVocabRequired: สวัสดี = hello; ขอบคุณ = thank you; ขอโทษ = sorry / excuse me; ใช่ = yes
blueprintRow.scriptTarget: Read and match simple identity lines such as ชื่อ and ประเทศ.
blueprintRow.listeningTarget: Recognize names and country statements in short self-introductions.
blueprintRow.speakingTarget: Introduce yourself with name and country in 2-3 lines.
blueprintRow.lessonQuizFocus: Question formation with ชื่ออะไร and origin statements with มาจาก.
blueprintRow.notes: Primary pattern lesson. Keep output controlled and highly scaffolded.
blueprintRow.sourceInspiration: Thai With Fah first-contact pragmatics; ThaiPod101 introduction lessons; internal backwards planning.
